name: Vanquisher
description: A Vladof launcher built for high-speed automatic fire rather than single massive blasts. Its triple-barrel cannon boosts rocket velocity and fire rate, and its reduced ammo consumption lets it sustain that stream longer than most launchers can. That makes it especially useful against faster targets such as Buzzards or groups of lighter enemies that reward quick follow-up shots. The tradeoff is very low damage per rocket and brutal ammo drain if you simply hold the trigger.
notes: Random world drop from suitable loot sources. It may play a reload animation even with no rockets left in reserve, but the magazine will remain empty.

special.description: Always rolls reduced ammo consumption, effectively giving one free shot for every three fired.
